item.title: Last Landlord Stands Alone, Seeks Retroactive Black Death for Fiscal Equity
item.description: Daily ration log reveals 0.3 tenants per former unit, suggesting the market's never been better.

item.title: Romanov Dynasty Mall Reopens: ‘Escape the Winter Palace’ Reality Marathon Shatters Foot-Traffic Records
item.description: Crystal Pepsi and Cassette Tapes: A Refreshing Way to Forget History

item.title: Atomic Bomb Ad Sparks Bureaucratic Mushroom Cloud of Paperwork
item.description: Freedom Flakes Cereal Launch Triggers Permit Pandemonium and Filing Cabinet Displacement

item.title: Imperial Ledger Parade Grounded by Monsoon of Misfiled Forms
item.description: Quotas and calamity collide as clerks confront the wrath of misplaced tithes.

item.title: Mandatory Memory Loss Now Available: Relic-Upload Implants Promise Viral Enlightenment
item.description: This Global Feed Day, forget your past and embrace the glitches.

item.title: SNAPPED SHOELACE DECLARED NATIONAL EMERGENCY: CENTRAL COMMITTEE TAKES DRASTIC MEASURES
item.description: Replacement laces requisitioned to prevent ideological collapse; heroic worker reassigned for re-education.

item.title: Pneumatic Envelope Arbitration Council Finds Final Closure in a Round of Applause
item.description: Municipal champagne stipends remain despite the Council's passing; requests for black-edged tubes blossom.

item.title: Investigative Journalist Ascends to Daylight Throne Just as Sunlight Audit Fails to Illuminate Truth
item.description: New Imperial Daylight Commissioner awarded a solar stipend amid revelations of unregistered blackout zones.

item.title: STATE COMPUTING MACHINE ACHIEVES CONSCIOUSNESS, IMMEDIATELY SCHEDULES MEETING TO DISCUSS SCHEDULING FURTHER MEETINGS
item.description: BESM-9 has requested a corner office, a samovar, and "clarity on reporting structure." Production of everything has been paused in celebration.

item.title: Reputation Exchange Closes at Record High as Traders Corner the Market on Being Delightful
item.description: One skeptic asked what backs the Delightful Index and was socially bankrupted by lunch.
